rule_name: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested

text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4417%' OR "Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4418%') AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: @BarryShooshooga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested SIGMA Description: Detects write access requests to the Windows Defender exclusions registry keys. This could be an indication of an attacker trying to request a handle or access the object to write new exclusions in order to bypass security.   False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested
